✅ MENTION SYSTEM INTEGRATION TEST

Post-Fix Validation Suite

STATUS: Testing MentionInputRef interface fix

Ready to test @ mention functionality

🎯 TEST INSTRUCTIONS

1. Open the main application: http://localhost:5173
2. Navigate to the PostCreator component
3. Click in the content textarea
4. Type the @ symbol
5. Check if the mention dropdown appears
6. Try selecting an agent from the dropdown
7. Verify the mention is inserted correctly

Expected Behavior After Fix:

  • Typing @ should trigger the mention dropdown
  • Dropdown should show available agents
  • Clicking an agent should insert @agent-name into text
  • Cursor should be positioned after the inserted mention
  • No console errors should occur

What Was Fixed:

✅ CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: MentionInputRef interface mismatch resolved
• Added missing selectionStart and selectionEnd properties to MentionInputRef
• Added setSelectionRange method to MentionInputRef
• Fixed PostCreator's insertFormatting function compatibility
• Exposed textarea properties through forwardRef properly

Components to Test:

  • PostCreator: Main content textarea with @ mention support
  • CommentForm: Comment input with @ mention support
  • QuickPost: (If available) Quick posting with mentions

🔍 Debugging Information:

If mentions still don't work, check the browser console for:

  • MentionService initialization logs
  • findMentionQuery debug messages
  • updateMentionState function calls
  • Dropdown rendering messages
  • Any remaining TypeScript errors

✅ SUCCESS CRITERIA

The mention system is working if:

  1. User types @ in any supported component
  2. A dropdown with agent suggestions appears immediately
  3. User can navigate suggestions with arrow keys
  4. User can click or press Enter to select an agent
  5. The mention @agent-name is inserted into the text
  6. The cursor is positioned correctly after the mention
  7. No errors appear in the browser console
